name: Buffalo Balls
recipeIngredient: 12 whole jalapeño peppers, seeded and chopped
1 tablespoon dehydrated scotch bonnet peppers, optional
3 cups favorite sauce for Buffalo Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Form the sausage and ground beef mixture into balls.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. Bake the balls until well done.
4. Douse in your favorite Buffalo Wing Sauce, such as homemade Harissa Sauce.
